The '''Eventide smasher''' was a heavy [[Sword/Legends|sword]] of incredible strength. Only the strongest of warriors were able to wield them, and only the most extremely skilled [[Fencing|fencers]] were able to use them effectively in battle.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Eventide smasher appears as a quest reward in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''. Although its description states that it is a sword, its in-game model is that of a [[mace]], a blunt weapon.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
